lemmas.primary_translation: democracy / people's rule / democratic country / workplace democracy

definitions.text: styreform der flertallet av folket har den avgjørende makten, enten gjennom direkte avstemninger eller gjennom valg av politiske representanter
definitions.translation: form of government where the majority of the people have the decisive power, either through direct votes or through the election of political representatives
country with a democratic form of government
examples: i et demokrati har alle rett til å ytre sin mening

definitions.text: system med utstrakt medbestemmelsesrett for underordnede, ansatte eller lignende
definitions.translation: system with extensive co-determination rights for subordinates, employees
